user.title: EV and Battery Charger
user.description: Calculate the required charging duration, planned start time and planned end time for an EV, plug-in hybrid or battery storage system. Optionally, the next event from a Home Assistant calendar can be used as the ready-by time; the new priority setting lets you choose whether the calendar or the daily ready-by time is used first.

data.name: Charger name
data.target_source_priority: Which ready-by time should be used first?

data_description.name: Example: Cupra Leon or Home Battery
data_description.soc_sensor: Entity that reports the current state of charge in percent.
data_description.target_soc_entity: Usually an input_number helper with the desired target charge in percent.
data_description.target_time: The vehicle should be ready by this time every day.
data_description.target_source_priority: Choose which ready-by time has priority: the next calendar event or the configured daily overnight time.
data_description.efficiency: Charging efficiency as a factor, for example 0.93 for 93%.
data_description.buffer_minutes: The planned charging end is this many minutes before the ready-by time. Default: 30 minutes.
data_description.calendar_entity: Optional: calendar.* entity. If a next event is available, its start time is used as the ready-by time. Leave empty to use only the daily time.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure EV and Battery Charger
reconfigure.description: Change the existing configuration. The integration will reload automatically afterwards.

data.name: Charger name
data.target_source_priority: Which ready-by time should be used first?

data_description.name: Example: Cupra Leon or Home Battery
data_description.soc_sensor: Entity that reports the current state of charge in percent.
data_description.target_soc_entity: Usually an input_number helper with the desired target charge in percent.
data_description.target_time: The vehicle should be ready by this time every day.
data_description.target_source_priority: Choose which ready-by time has priority: the next calendar event or the configured daily overnight time.
data_description.efficiency: Charging efficiency as a factor, for example 0.93 for 93%.
data_description.buffer_minutes: The planned charging end is this many minutes before the ready-by time. Default: 30 minutes.
data_description.calendar_entity: Optional: calendar.* entity. If a next event is available, its start time is used as the ready-by time. Leave empty to use only the daily time.

error.invalid_entity: Please enter a valid entity, for example sensor.garage_homeassistant_batterie.
error.invalid_time: Please enter the time as HH:MM or HH:MM:SS, for example 06:00.
error.must_be_positive: The value must be greater than 0.
error.invalid_efficiency: Charging efficiency must be greater than 0 and no more than 1, for example 0.93.
error.must_not_be_negative: The value must not be negative.
error.invalid_calendar_entity: Please enter a valid calendar entity, for example calendar.cupra_charging, or leave the field empty.
error.invalid_target_source_priority: Please choose Calendar event first or Daily overnight time first.

abort.unknown_entry: The existing configuration was not found.

init.title: EV and Battery Charger options
init.description: Adjust the entities, optional calendar, priority and charging parameters used for the charging plan.
